description: Each attack has a chance to fire a second arrow shortly after the first. The second shot rolls its own crit and benefits from Split Shot and Pierce when owned.
tooltipTemplate: {procChance%} chance on each attack to fire a second shot {delaySeconds:2}s later. The second shot rerolls crit and triggers Split Shot / Pierce when owned.

description: Each hit triggers a small explosion at the target. Enemies caught in the blast take damage. When paired with Hunter's Mark, blast victims also receive a mark stack. Explosions never chain.
tooltipTemplate: Hits explode for {damageMultiplier%} damage in a {explosionRadius}px radius. Applies Hunter's Mark to blast victims if Hunter's Mark is owned. Explosions cannot trigger more explosions.

description: Master archer: doubled range, increased crit chance, and devastating crit damage.
tooltipTemplate: Attack range +{attackRangeBonus%}. Crit chance +{critChanceBonus%}. Crit damage {critMultiplier:1}×.
